title: Immortal and Formless Self
summary: The Self is ever pure, immortal, and untouched by physical changes. Addresses body image issues, fear of aging, and physical sickness.

sections.summary: Themes: action and duty, self-knowledge, devotion. The passage moves from “How can I worship that Consciousness which has no qualities and also is not quality-less, which has no attachments and detachments, which is…” through “My son, I am beyond existence and non-existence, I am beyond the union and separation, I am beyond the mental activities and absence of those. I…” through “If I am not the three places, how can I be the forth? If I am not the three times how can I be the forth? I am the ultimate truth and extremely…”

Themes: action and duty, devotion, mind and meditation. The passage moves from “I do not have the divisions of big and small. I do not have the divisions of wide and narrow. I do not have the divisions of angular or…” through “The one devoid of life and lifelessness shines forever. The one devoid of source and sourceless-ness shines forever. The one devoid of…” through “Your nature has not even tiniest amount of detachment, not even the tiniest amount of attachment, not even the tiniest amount of desires. I am…”

Themes: mind and meditation, freedom from attachment, virtue and right conduct. The passage moves from “At your core is no absorption, no meditator, at your core is no exterior, no meditation, at your core is no time and space, no object of…” through “Know that there is only one knowledge - it is not fire, not air, not earth, not water, it never comes and goes, it is like infinite sky.” through “Renounce the illusory world and completely give up the renouncing. Renunciation as well as clinging, both are poison. Your essence is pure,…”

verses.sanskrit: गुणविगुणविभागो वर्तते नैव किञ्चित् रतिविरतिविहीनं निर्मलं निष्प्रपञ्चम्। गुणाविगुणविहीनं व्यापकं विश्वरूपं कथमहमिह वन्दे व्योमरूपं शिवं वै।।१।।
verses.translation: How can I worship that Consciousness which has no qualities and also is not quality-less, which has no attachments and detachments, which is pure and innocent, which is all pervading like space?

verses.sanskrit: तादिवर्णरहितो नियतं शिवश्च कार्यं हि कारणमिदं हि परं शिवश्च। एवं विकल्परहितोऽहमलं शिवश्च स्वात्मानमात्मनि सुमित्र कथं नमामि।।२।।
verses.translation: My dear friend, how can I worship that Consciousness which I myself am, which is not white or any other colour, which is eternal and undifferentiated, which is both cause and effect.

verses.sanskrit: निर्मूलमूलरहितो हि सदोदितोऽहं निर्धूमधूमरहितो हि सदोदितोऽहम्। निर्दीपदीपरहितो हि सदोदितोऽहं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३।।
verses.translation: I am ever present, never sets, have no beginning or beginning-less, I am in shadow and not in it, I shine brightly and I do not. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निष्कामकाममिह नाम कथं वदामि निःसङ्गसङ्गमिह नाम कथं वदामि। निःसारसाररहितं च कथं वदामि ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।४।।
verses.translation: How can I speak of that which is desireless and desirous, is attached and unattached, has substance and is still empty, I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: अद्वैतरूपमखिलं हि कथं वदामि द्वैतस्वरूपमखिलं हि कथं वदामि। नित्यं त्वनित्यमखिलं हि कथं वदामि ज्ञानमृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।५।।
verses.translation: How can I speak of that whole which is non-dual, which is expressed as dual, which manifests as both eternal and impermanent. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: स्थूलं हि नो नहि कृशं न गतागतं हि आद्यन्तमध्यरहितं न परापरं हि। सत्यं वदामि खलु वै परमार्थतत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।६।।
verses.translation: It is neither gross nor subtle, neither goes nor comes, has no beginning, end or middle, it transcends all and does not transcend also. I speak the truth, this is the ultimate Truth, I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: संविद्धि सर्वकरणानि नभोनिभानि संविद्धि सर्वविषयांश्च नभोनिभांश्च। संविद्धि चैकममलं न हि बन्धमुक्तं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।७।।
verses.translation: Know well that all sensory instruments are empty like space, all sense objects are empty like space, know that which is pure and boundless. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: दुर्बोधबोधगहनो न भवामि तात दुर्लक्ष्यलक्ष्यगहनो न भवामि तात। आसन्नरूपगहनो न भवामि तात ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।८।।
verses.translation: My son, I am not beyond knowledge but I am also not some deeper knowledge which is difficult to get. I am not beyond concentrated attention, nor am I some deeper attention, I am not formless nor am I some deeper form, I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निष्कर्मकर्मदहनो ज्वलनो भवामि निर्दुःखदुःखदहनो ज्वलनो भवामि। निर्देहदेहदहनो ज्वलनो भवामि ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।९।।
verses.translation: I do not have karma, I am that fire which burns the karma, I do not have suffering, I am the fire that burns the suffering, I do not have a body, I am the fire that burns the body. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निष्पापपापदहनो हि हुताशनोऽहं निर्धर्मधर्मदहनो हि हुताशनोऽहम्। निर्बन्धबन्धदहनो हि हुताशनोऽहं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१०।।
verses.translation: I am not the doer of wrong deeds, I am the fire that burns the wrong deeds. I am not the doer of right actions, I am the fire that burns the right actions. I am not bound, I am the fire that burns the bondage. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निर्भावभावरहितो न भवामि वत्स निर्योगयोगरहितो न भवामि वत्स। निश्चित्तचित्तरहितो न भवामि वत्स ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।११।।
verses.translation: My son, I am beyond existence and non-existence, I am beyond the union and separation, I am beyond the mental activities and absence of those. I am the essence of all knowledge omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निर्मोहमोहपदवीति न मे विकल्पो निःशोकशोकपदवीति न मे विकल्पः। निर्लोभलोभपदवीति न मे विकल्पो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१२।।
verses.translation: One goes in attachments, but I am the unattached one, it is not my ignorance. One goes in suffering, but I am free from it, it is not my ignorance. One goes in greed, but I am not greedy, it is not my ignorance. I am the essence of all knowledge omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: संसारसन्तिलता न च मे कदाचित् सन्तोषसन्ततिसुखो न च मे कदाचित्। अज्ञानबन्धनमिदं न च मे कदाचित् ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१३।।
verses.translation: I am never entwined in the worldly matters, contentment and pleasures resulting from them are never mine, bondage of ignorance is never mine. I am the essence of all knowledge omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: संसारसन्ततिरजो न च मे विकारः सन्तापसन्ततितमो न च मे विकारः। सत्त्वं स्वधर्मजनकं न च मे विकारो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१४।।
verses.translation: Worldly activities do not produce any defects in me. Suffering resulting from one’s inactivity produce no defects in me. Right conduct resulting from truth produce no defects in me.

verses.sanskrit: सन्तापदुःखजनको न विधिः कदाचित् सन्तापयोगजनितं न कदाचित् मनः। यस्मादहङ्कृतिरियं न च मे कदाचित ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१५।।
verses.translation: I do not create the suffering or pains. A mind in union does not create suffering. Egoic activities are not me. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निष्कम्पकम्पनिधनं न विकल्पकल्पं स्वप्नप्रबोधनिधनं न हिताहितं हि। निःसारसारनिधनं न चराचरं हि ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१६।।
verses.translation: I am the end of the change and changelessness. I have no delusions or imaginations. I am the end of dream and waking state. I am neither beneficial nor harmful. I am the end of the essential and nonessential. I'm not the moving or still. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: नो वेद्यवेदकमिदं न च हेतुतर्क्यं वाचामगोचरमिदं न मनो न बुद्धिः। एवं कथं हि भवतः कथयामि तत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१७।।
verses.translation: I'm neither the knower nor the known. I am not the cause and I'm not the effect. I am beyond speech, mind or intellect. How can the one truth be described by words? I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निर्भिन्नभिन्नरहितं परमार्थतत्त्व मन्तर्बहिर्न हि कथं परमार्थतत्त्वम्। प्राक्सम्भवं न च रतं नहि वस्तु किञ्चित् ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१८।।
verses.translation: I am the ultimate truth with and without divisions having no interior and exterior, never had a beginning. I am not an object. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: रागादिदोषरहितं त्वहमेव तत्त्वं दैवादिदोषरहितं त्वहमेव तत्त्वं। संसारशोकरहितं त्वहमेव तत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।१९।।
verses.translation: I am the ultimate truth which is free from defects of attachments, which is free from defects of destiny, which is free from defects caused by worldly existence. I am the essence of all knowledge omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: स्थानत्रयं यदि च नेति कथं तुरीयं कालत्रयं यदि च नेति कथं दिशश्च। शान्तं पदं हि परमं परमार्थतत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२०।।
verses.translation: If I am not the three places, how can I be the forth? If I am not the three times how can I be the forth? I am the ultimate truth and extremely peaceful. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: दीर्घो लघुः पुनरितीह न मे विभागो विस्तारसंकटमितीह न मे विभागः। कोणं हि वर्तुलमितीह न मे विभागो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२१।।
verses.translation: I do not have the divisions of big and small. I do not have the divisions of wide and narrow. I do not have the divisions of angular or circular. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: मातापितादि तनयादि न मे कदाचित् जातं मृतं न च मनो न च मे कदाचित्। निर्व्याकुलं स्थिरमिदं परमार्थतत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२२।।
verses.translation: I never had a father, mother or children. I was never born, never died. I am not the mind. I am free of anxiety - the ultimate truth, very stable. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: शुद्धं विशुद्धमविचारमनन्तरूपं निर्लेपलेपमविचारमनन्तरूपम्। निष्खण्डखण्डमविचारमनन्तरूपं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२३।।
verses.translation: I am infinite and unthinkable, beyond pure and impure, beyond attached and detached, beyond differentiated and undifferentiated. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: ब्रह्मादयः सुरगणाः कथमत्र सन्ति स्वर्गादयो वसतयः कथमत्र सन्ति। यद्येकरूपममलं परमार्थतत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२४।।
verses.translation: How can a creator, all gods and other entities be there? How can there be heavens and other worlds? I am the ultimate truth, spotlessly clean. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निर्नेति नेति विमलो हि कथं वदामि निःशेषशेषविमलो हि कथं वदामि। निर्लिङ्गलिङ्गविमलो हि कथं वदामि ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२५।।
verses.translation: How can I speak of that purity which is not-this and also this, which is not supported and also a foundation, which has a gender and is also genderless? I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निष्कर्मकर्मपरमं सततं करोमि निःसङ्गसङ्गरहितं परमं विनोदम्। निर्देहदेहरहितं सततं विनोदं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२६।।
verses.translation: I am always performing actions without acting. I am the eternal bliss without attachments or detachments. I am the eternal bliss with and without a body. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: मायाप्रपञ्चरचना न च मे विकारः कौटिल्यदम्भरचना न च मे विकारः। सत्यानृतेति रचना न च मे विकारो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२७।।
verses.translation: I am not affected by the illusory world of matter, by the deceit and arrogance or true or false that exist in this creation. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: सन्ध्यादिकालरहितं न च मे वियोगो ह्यन्तः प्रबोधरहितं बधिरो न मूकः। एवं विकल्परहितं न च भावशुद्धं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२८।।
verses.translation: I am devoid of time, evening or morning. I have no separate parts. I have no interior perception. I am neither mute nor deaf. I do not become pure. I am already pure, free from illusions. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निर्नाथनाथरहितं हि निराकुलं वै निश्चित्तचित्तविगतं हि निराकुलं वै। संविद्धि सर्वविगतं हि निराकुलं वै ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२९।।
verses.translation: I am the peaceful one, who is with master and also without him, who is in presence of the mind as well as absence of it. Know well that I am the peaceful one who is beyond everything. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: कान्तारमन्दिरमिदं हि कथं वदामि संसिद्धसंशयमिदं हि कथं वदामि। एवं निरन्तरसमं हि निराकुलं वै ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३०।।
verses.translation: How can I say this is a wild forest or a temple? How can I say this is proven or doubtful? I am the continuous peaceful presence. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: निर्जीवजीवरहितं सततं विभाति निर्बीजबीजरहितं सततं विभाति। निर्वाणबन्धरहितं सततं विभाति ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३१।।
verses.translation: The one devoid of life and lifelessness shines forever. The one devoid of source and sourceless-ness shines forever. The one devoid of liberation and bondage shines forever. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: सम्भूतिवर्जितमिदं सततं विभाति संसारवर्जितमिदं सततं विभाति। संहारवर्जितमिदं सततं विभाति ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३२।।
verses.translation: Devoid of a beginning it shines forever. Devoid of a worldly existence it shines forever. Devoid of destruction it shines forever. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: उल्लेखमात्रमपि ते न च नामरूपं निर्भिन्नभिन्नमपि ते न हि वस्तु किञ्चित्। निर्लज्जमानस करोषि कथं विषादं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३३।।
verses.translation: Even if it is said, you don't have a name and form. Even if you are differentiated or undifferentiated you are not an object. O shameless mind, why are you suffering? I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न जरा न मृत्युः किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च जन्मदुःखम्। किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते विकारो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३४।।
verses.translation: My friend why do you cry, you have no old age, no death, you have no birth, no suffering, you have no defects. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते स्वरूपं किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते विरूपम्। किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते वयांसि ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३५।।
verses.translation: My friend why do you cry, you have no form, you are not deformed, you are ageless. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like a space.

verses.sanskrit: किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते वयांसि किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते मनांसि। किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न तवेन्द्रियाणि ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३६।।
verses.translation: My friend why do you cry, you are not old, you are not a mind, you are not senses. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च तेऽस्ति कामः किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते प्रलोभः। किं नाम रोदिषि सखे न च ते विमोहो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३७।।
verses.translation: My friend why do you cry, you have no lust, you have no greed, you have no attachments. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: ऐश्वर्यमिच्छसि कथं न च ते धनानि ऐश्वर्यमिच्छसि कथं न च ते हि पत्नी। ऐश्वर्यमिच्छसि कथं न च ते ममेति ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३८।।
verses.translation: Why do you desire for prosperity, you do not have wealth, you do not have a wife, you do not own anything. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: लिङ्गप्रपञ्चजनुषी न च ते न मे च निर्लज्जमानसमिदं च विभाति भिन्नम्। निर्भेदभेदरहितं न च ते न मे च ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।३९।।
verses.translation: Both you and me are not born of this illusory material world. The shameless mind divides and makes it appear separate. Both you and me are free of division and non-division. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: नो वाणुमात्रमपि ते हि विरागरूपं नो वाणुमात्रमपि ते हि सरागरूपम्। नो वाणुमात्रमपि ते हि सकामरूपं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।४०।।
verses.translation: Your nature has not even tiniest amount of detachment, not even the tiniest amount of attachment, not even the tiniest amount of desires. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: ध्याता न ते हि हृदये न च ते समाधि र्ध्यानं न ते हि हृदये न बहिः प्रदेशः। ध्येयं न चेति हृदये न हि वस्तु कालो ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।४१।।
verses.translation: At your core is no absorption, no meditator, at your core is no exterior, no meditation, at your core is no time and space, no object of meditation. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: यत्सारभूतमखिलं कथितं मया ते न त्वं न मे न महतो न गुरुर्न शिष्यः। स्वच्छन्दरूपसहजं परमार्थतत्त्वं ज्ञानामृतं समरसं गगनोपमोऽहम्।।४२।।
verses.translation: I have told you the whole essence of everything. You, me, matter, Guru and student do not exist. The ultimate truth is naturally free. I am the essence of all knowledge, omnipresent like space.

verses.sanskrit: कथमिह परमार्थं तत्त्वमानन्दरूपं कथमिह परमार्थं नैवमानन्दरूपम्। कथमिह परमार्थं ज्ञानविज्ञानरूपं यदि परमहमेकं वर्तते व्योमरूपम्।।४३।।
verses.translation: If I am ultimately one, like space, how can the truth be of the nature of bliss, how can the truth be of the nature of suffering, how can the truth be of the nature of knowledge?

verses.sanskrit: दहनपवनहीनं विद्धि विज्ञानमेक मवनिजलविहीनं विद्धि विज्ञानरूपम्। समगमनविहीनं विद्धि विज्ञानमेकं गगनमिव विशालं विद्धि विज्ञानमेकम्।।४४।।
verses.translation: Know that there is only one knowledge - it is not fire, not air, not earth, not water, it never comes and goes, it is like infinite sky.

verses.sanskrit: न शून्यरूपं न विशून्यरूपं न शुद्धरूपं न विशुद्धरूपम्। रूपं विरूपं न भवामि किञ्चित् स्वरूपरूपं परमार्थतत्त्वम्।।४५।।
verses.translation: It is not nothing, not something. It is not pure, not impure. It is not form, not formless. The ultimate truth has its own unique nature.

verses.sanskrit: मुञ्च मुञ्च हि संसारं त्यागं मुञ्च हि सर्वथा। त्यागात्यागविषं शुद्धममृतं सहजं ध्रुवम्।।४६।।
verses.translation: Renounce the illusory world and completely give up the renouncing. Renunciation as well as clinging, both are poison. Your essence is pure, natural and unchanging.
